# mixedsubjectsirt

`mixedsubjectsirt` is a package that allows the integration of
LLM-generated item responses in psychometric calibration studies.

## Installation

You can install the development version of mixedsubjectsirt like so:

``` r

devtools::install_github('klintkanopka/mixedsubjectsirt')
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ability_gradient()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/ability_gradient.md)
  : Gradient of ML ability scores with respect to item parameters
- [`ability_risk()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/ability_risk.md)
  : Propagated ability risk from item-parameter uncertainty
- [`diagnose_lambda_grid()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/diagnose_lambda_grid.md)
  : Diagnose lambda values over a grid
- [`fit_2pl()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/fit_2pl.md)
  : Fit a unidimensional 2PL IRT model
- [`fit_mixed_subjects()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/fit_mixed_subjects.md)
  : Fit a mixed-subjects 2PL calibration
- [`fit_mixed_subjects_from_quadrature()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/fit_mixed_subjects_from_quadrature.md)
  : Fit from precomputed quadrature summaries
- [`fit_mixed_subjects_split()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/fit_mixed_subjects_split.md)
  : Fit a split-sample mixed-subjects 2PL calibration
- [`link_item_parameters()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/link_item_parameters.md)
  : Link item parameters onto a target scale
- [`make_quadrature()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/make_quadrature.md)
  : Create a standard-normal Gauss-Hermite quadrature grid
- [`mixed_subjects_loss()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/mixed_subjects_loss.md)
  : Mixed-subjects objective function
- [`mixed_subjects_quadrature()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/mixed_subjects_quadrature.md)
  : Convert responses to quadrature form
- [`posterior_weights_2pl()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/posterior_weights_2pl.md)
  : Compute posterior quadrature weights for a 2PL model
- [`score_theta()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/score_theta.md)
  : Estimate ability scores from a 2PL calibration
- [`simulate_2pl()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/simulate_2pl.md)
  : Simulate 2PL item responses
- [`summarize_expected_counts()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/summarize_expected_counts.md)
  : Summarize response data as expected quadrature counts
- [`tune_lambda_ability()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/tune_lambda_ability.md)
  : Tune lambda by downstream ability risk
- [`tune_lambda_ability_crossfit()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/tune_lambda_ability_crossfit.md)
  : Cross-fit ability-risk lambda tuning
- [`tune_lambda_grid()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/tune_lambda_grid.md)
  : Tune lambda over a grid
- [`vcov_mixed_subjects()`](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/reference/vcov_mixed_subjects.md)
  : Sandwich covariance for a mixed-subjects fit

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Per-Item Lambda
  (Experimental)](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/articles/lambda-tuning-item.md):
- [Choosing Lambda in Mixed-Subjects
  IRT](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/articles/lambda-tuning.md):
- [IRT Linking and Gradient Asymmetry: Diagnostic
  Guide](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/articles/linking-comparison.md):
- [Mixed-Subjects 1PL
  Calibration](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/articles/mixed-subjects-1pl.md):
- [Mixed-Subjects IRT
  Calibration](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/articles/mixed-subjects-workflow.md):
- [Simulation Validation of the Mixed-Subjects MML
  Estimator](http://klintkanopka.com/mixedsubjectsirt/articles/simulation-validation.md):
